visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you do not meet the requirements for short-term stay, such as in cases where you intend to work in Japan for remuneration or study in Japan for more than 90 days etc., which are for purpose other than that of temporary visitor, should apply for a “Certificate of Eligibility” in Japan at the Regional Immigration Bureau of Japan nearby before the visa application.
However, if you can’t apply for the “Certificate of Eligibility”, please follow the distinction of a checklist.
The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents and all the documents which had been submitted will not returned to applicants.
If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you do not meet the requirements for short-term stay, such as in cases where you intend to work in Japan for remuneration or study in Japan for more than 90 days etc., which are for purpose other than that of temporary visitor, should apply for a “Certificate of Eligibility” in Japan at the Regional Immigration Bureau of Japan nearby before the visa application.
However, if you can’t apply for the “Certificate of Eligibility”, please follow the distinction of a checklist.
The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents and all the documents which had been submitted will not returned to applicants.
If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.

## Visa Fees
All visa fees must be paid in KOREAN WON(KRW) and must be paid in cash or bank transfer with the application. Please check with the center first for any inquiries regarding visa fees.

[Short-term Stay Visa]

[Short-term Stay Visa 2]
- *The VFS Global Service fee will be non-refundable.

## Documents Required

Checklist-Long Term Visa -ENG to find the required documents for applicants.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be 3.5cm x 4.5cm and within 6 months.
(*There must be prepared 2 pics only for who was acquired from Russia or CIS Countries of nationality.)

Do not make the face too small or large within the photo frame.
Do not excessively brighten the image.
Do not take the photo in a dark place, as it may create shadows on the face.
Do not edit the photo using Photoshop or other applications.

## Processing Time

- It approximately takes 7days in average after the application is submitted. (Including by
 
business hours
)
- Additional documents may be required on a case- by-case basis. It may take longer than usual to receive the result of the visa examination.

## Download Forms

- Visa Application Form-ENG

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A short-term stay visa is up to 90 days for tourism, business, visiting friends or relatives, etc. That does not include remunerative activities. The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents. All the documents which had been submitted will not be returned to applicants. If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.
If your visit to Japan is for the purpose of single-entry tourism, you may be eligible to apply for an eVISA (electronic visa).
The eVISA allows you to submit your application and receive your visa easily and quickly online, without the need to visit the center in person.
If you intend to apply for a single-entry tourist eVISA, please contact us at: info.jpkr@vfshelpline.com (mailto:info.jpkr@vfshelpline.com)
You cannot apply an eVISA, if your purpose of visit is visiting relatives/friends, attending a conference or business, etc.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A short-term stay visa is up to 90 days for tourism, business, visiting friends or relatives, etc. That does not include remunerative activities. The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents. All the documents which had been submitted will not be returned to applicants. If your visa application is refused, then you should not carry out visa application with the same purpose within 6 months from the date of refusal. Embassy does not publish reasons for refusing a visa application.
If your visit to Japan is for the purpose of single-entry tourism, you may be eligible to apply for an eVISA (electronic visa).
The eVISA allows you to submit your application and receive your visa easily and quickly online, without the need to visit the center in person.
If you intend to apply for a single-entry tourist eVISA, please contact us at: info.jpkr@vfshelpline.com (mailto:info.jpkr@vfshelpline.com)
You cannot apply an eVISA, if your purpose of visit is visiting relatives/friends, attending a conference or business, etc.

## Visa Fees
All visa fees must be paid in KOREAN WON(KRW) and must be paid in cash or bank transfer with the application. Please check with the center first for any inquiries regarding visa fees.

[Short-term Stay Visa]

[Short-term Stay Visa 2]
- *The VFS Global Service fee will be non-refundable.

## Documents Required
- Checklist-Short Term Visa -ENG to find the required documents for applicants.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be 3.5cm x 4.5cm and within 6 months.
(*There must be prepared 2 pics only for who was acquired from Russia or CIS Countries of nationality.)

Do not make the face too small or large within the photo frame.
Do not excessively brighten the image.
Do not take the photo in a dark place, as it may create shadows on the face.
Do not edit the photo using Photoshop or other applications.

## Processing Time

- It approximately takes 7days in average after the application is submitted. (Including by
 
business hours
)
- Additional documents may be required on a case- by-case basis. It may take longer than usual to receive the result of the visa examination.

## Download Forms

- Visa Application Form-ENG
- Travel Itinerary
Documents from the Japanese Inviter
- Letter invitation
- List of visa applicants
- Overview of company organization
- Letter of Guarantee

visa_types.overview:
Overview
With the aim of giving young Korean people the opportunity to gain a deeper understanding of the culture and general way in life of Japan, the working holiday scheme will allow those who meet the conditions to stay on holiday in Japan for up to one year and secondarily to take up employment there in order to supplement their travel funds. Please note that Working Holiday applications must be submitted in person.
The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents and all the documents which had been submitted will not be returned to applicants.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
With the aim of giving young Korean people the opportunity to gain a deeper understanding of the culture and general way in life of Japan, the working holiday scheme will allow those who meet the conditions to stay on holiday in Japan for up to one year and secondarily to take up employment there in order to supplement their travel funds. Please note that Working Holiday applications must be submitted in person.
The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents and all the documents which had been submitted will not be returned to applicants.

## Visa Fees
All visa fees must be paid in KOREAN WON(KRW) and must be paid in cash or bank transfer with the application. Please check with the center first for any inquiries regarding visa fees.

[Short-term Stay Visa]

[Short-term Stay Visa 2]
- *The VFS Global Service fee will be non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Checklist-Working Holiday Visa-ENG.pdf to find the required documents for applicants.

## Photo Specifications
Please submit one photograph along with your visa application. The photograph must be 3.5cm x 4.5cm and within 6 months.
(*There must be prepared 2 pics only for who was acquired from Russia or CIS Countries of nationality.)

Do not make the face too small or large within the photo frame.
Do not excessively brighten the image.
Do not take the photo in a dark place, as it may create shadows on the face.
Do not edit the photo using Photoshop or other applications.

## Processing Time

- It approximately takes 7days in average after the application is submitted. (Including by
 
business hours
)
- Additional documents may be required on a case- by-case basis. It may take longer than usual to receive the result of the visa examination.

must be wiritten in Japanese or English

visa_types.overview:
Overview
The visa issued to foreign patients wishing to visit Japan for medical purposes (including full medical check-ups). The visa is issued to their accompanying person(s) as well if necessary and as needed.
The basic documents (The required documents for the visa application submission) must be followed the instruction from Japanese Embassy. After submitting application, in the processing time, Embassy may require applicants providing more supporting documents and all the documents which had been submitted will not returned to applicants.
